title: Armourscape
description: Implementing Forgotten Armors with Old School ArmourScape!
body:
# Old School Armourscapes
Bring back the classic, forgotten armors of Minecraft with **Armourscapes**! This datapack restores beta and unfinished armors like **Studded**, **Plate** and **Gilded**.

## Armoursets
### Studded Armour
- One of the original armour pieces from _Legend of the Chambered_.
- Equally strong as Chainmail.
- Can be Dyed.
- Relatively Cheap.
- Does not take durability damage from spike damage (Berry Bushes, Cacti, Stalagmites, Etc).
- Can float on Powdered Snow.
### Plate Armour
- Another original armour piece from _Legend of the Chambered_.
- Crafted from Netherite Scrap as a "demo" of Netherite.
- Nearly as strong as Netherite, but only half a set can be crafted.
- Can be smelted back into Netherite Scrap.
- Does not take durability damage from fire (Like Netherite).
### Gilded Netherite Armour
- The same as Netherite Armour, but prettier!
- Piglin-approved content!

## Additional Information
- All armour can be trimmed, including **Gilded Netherite**.

## FAQ's
- There aren't any FAQs yet. Any questions from other pages will be shared in here.
